description: Reduce TOTAL_BATCH_SIZE to 16384 to maximize gradient steps within budget
Change WINDOW_PATTERN from "SSSL" to "SSSS" to replace the expensive full attention layer with sliding window attention throughout the model.
notes: The "L" (full context) layer in "SSSL" significantly increases per-step latency
